title: Agent Assembler Recipe
description: Schema for auto-generated recipe JSON files in the AutoCraft pipeline.

trigger_keywords.description: List of keyword strings that trigger this recipe.

skills.description: List of skill file names (without extension) referenced by this recipe.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes or description for the recipe.

routing.description: Optional routing configuration to direct queries to a specific agent.

agent_id.description: The target agent ID for routing.

fallback.description: Fallback agent ID if primary is unavailable.

script_path.description: Path to a Python script to be executed by the Script Engine.

engine_config.description: Optional engine-level configuration for recipe execution.

model.description: LLM model to use for this recipe.
